description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and two thick seat cushions, all of which appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a monolithic, geometric appearance. The base and sides are fully enclosed, with no visible legs, contributing to a grounded and solid look. The upholstery has a subtle, slightly textured weave, adding visual interest to the otherwise uniform color. This sofa would be well-suited for urban parks, public plazas, or contemporary outdoor lounge areas.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in dark gray fabric with broad armrests and plush, loose cushions. The design is minimalist and solid, with a subtle textured upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two seat cushions, and broad, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick seat and back cushions, and the full-height, rectangular armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa with two prominent back cushions and a solid, continuous base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two thick, loose seat cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, rectangular armrests at full seat and backrest height, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and flush with the ground, giving a block-like appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest formed by two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, slightly textured weave and no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
